## Checklist

- [ ] `make verify` passes (THE gate: lint, format, types, security, tests + coverage, build)
- [ ] New or changed behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Docs (README / USAGE) updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, internal/private data, or large binaries committed
